skills.name: brand-archetype-quiz
skills.description: Interactive quiz that identifies a brand's primary, secondary, and tension archetypes from a library of 100 archetypes across 17 categories. Free, no signup required.

skills.name: brand-archetype-directory
skills.description: Searchable directory of 100 brand and storytelling archetypes across 17 categories. Each entry includes definition, keywords, mythology reference, and real brand examples.

skills.name: brand-positioning-builder
skills.description: 7-step brand positioning statement builder that generates a Neumeier Onliness Statement and full positioning document.

skills.name: brand-audit-checklist
skills.description: 20-point brand audit that scores positioning, visual identity, voice, consistency, and proof. Returns a prioritised fix list.

skills.name: brand-strategy-blog
skills.description: Brand strategy writing on archetypes, positioning, differentiation, and brand psychology by Ezra Dombowsky.
